Appearances:
Plaintiff Hani Haddad is present.
Attorney Richard Beckman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Niko Tene is present.
Attorney Robert Beyersappearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-04-2016 is vacated. (JPT/501)
